_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Manage the indexing/cataloguing, storage, and access of explicit organizational knowledge (e.g., hard copy documents, digital files).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.624), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.592).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.670). Shared vocabulary: [access]. DCWF-only terms [cataloguing, copy, digital, documents, explicit, files] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context, curating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.858, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (98.8%). The model interprets "Manage the indexing/cataloguing, storage, and access of explicit organizational" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Equal' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.654 ≈ STS 0.670 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [access] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.7%. Shared tokens: [access]. DCWF-only: [cataloguing, copy, digital, documents, explicit, files]. WIDAI-only: [business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context, curating].
